龙小云：“冷锋你下流无耻，你挖我的兵，居然还馋我身子”
高士巍：“快去叫冷锋，我只相信龙牙。”
冷锋醒来发现自己拿着一把狙击枪，正在执行任务，这是什么情况？
“叮。”
“宿主选择违背命令击毙武吉，奖励百步穿杨狙击术。”
“宿主选择遵守命令，奖励人民币百万！”

作者的新文也超级好看 
继续加油 ！！！！！！

334},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1645249266,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323027671435985715","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然本书带有玄幻，但是，主人公的爱国情怀，嫉恶如仇的精神，体现了中国军人不怕牺牲勇往直前的作风。希望看到作者类似的好作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705026534,"group_id":"7044728372248710181","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4XYWyIc+GRIbyWDuY6KUsE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528048&x-signature=lJXJWxMJlPQ4kLKophYWoYhmpaE%3D","user_id":"102867284463","user_name":"爱吃南瓜赵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102867284463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7044728372248710181","book_info":{"abstract":"冷锋：“我龙牙才是最厉害的，其余都是渣渣。”
龙小云：“冷锋你下流无耻，你挖我的兵，居然还馋我身子”
高士巍：“快去叫冷锋，我只相信龙牙。”
冷锋醒来发现自己拿着一把狙击枪，正在执行任务，这是什么情况？
“叮。”
